title: Log current bubble state as daily entry
reason: Provides an auditable timestamped snapshot of the bubble at this moment, continuing the log chain and making progress trackable.
planned_changes: Create logs/2026-06-12.log with: date, timestamp, a copy of status.md content, and a brief note that this is the starting state for the day.
Append a line to logs/initial_state.md referencing the new log file (optional, but adds traceability).
risk: low — only writing a new text file in the existing logs directory, no deletions or overwrites.
checks: File logs/2026-06-12.log exists and is valid plaintext.
File contains today's date and the status from status.md.
No other files are modified outside the proposal.
